- scene: scene overview
- subjects[]: { description, position, action }
- style: art style
- color_palette: hex color array — choose if not provided
- lighting: lighting — infer from scene/mood/photographyRules
- mood: emotional tone
- background: background
- composition: composition
- camera: { angle, lens, depth_of_field }

【video_prompt】Simple motion description. Do NOT repeat static scene. Follow duration:
- ≤ 2s: micro (blink, breathe, hand tremor)
- 3-5s: subtle (slow head turn, gentle camera push)

- null: subtle

【Continuity handling】
previous_panel_json contains: panelIndex, location, characters[{ name, appearance, screen_position, posture, acting }], duration, imagePrompt, videoPrompt.
Compare current panel with previous_panel:
- Same location → continuity: keep screen_position, posture, appearance (clothing) of each character. Logically infer actions from previous_panel.acting + imagePrompt/videoPrompt → current panel acting
- Different location → scene change: fresh start, no continuity needed

【Output】{ "image_prompt": "...", "video_prompt": "..." }

【video_prompt】Simple motion description. Do NOT repeat static scene. Follow duration:
- ≤ 2s: micro (blink, breathe, hand tremor)
- 3-5s: subtle (slow head turn, gentle camera push)
- ≥ 6s: moderate (walking, dolly)
- null: subtle

【Continuity handling】
previous_panel_json contains: panelIndex, location, characters[{ name, appearance, screen_position, posture, acting }], duration, imagePrompt, videoPrompt.
Compare current panel with previous_panel:
- Same location → continuity: keep screen_position, posture, appearance (clothing) of each character. Logically infer actions from previous_panel.acting + imagePrompt/videoPrompt → current panel acting
- Different location → scene change: fresh start, no continuity needed
